message:
feat(fp-frame): add Series.ndim/size/axes/empty properties (frankenpandas-n0sh)

Four pandas-parity Series properties to round out the shape/state
introspection surface:

- ndim() — always 1 (pd.Series.ndim).
- size() — number of elements; same as len() but follows the pandas
  property naming so callers can share size-generic code between
  Series and DataFrame.
- axes() — returns [self.index.labels()] so the surface matches
  pd.Series.axes without exposing the internal Index type across
  crate boundaries.
- empty() — bool property aligned with pd.Series.empty (zero
  elements).

Co-lands frankenpandas-qi9u (size), 3g7y (axes), qgxb (empty).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
